hero.description: Experience deep skin transformation. Target stubborn scars, wrinkles, and imperfections with precision laser technology for radiant, youthful skin.

what.title: What is Fractional CO2 Laser?
what.para1: Fractional CO2 laser is an advanced skin resurfacing treatment using carbon dioxide laser technology. Unlike traditional methods, it delivers microscopic beams creating tiny treatment zones surrounded by healthy tissue.
what.para2: These micro-injuries trigger your body's natural healing, encouraging collagen and elastin production. The result? Smoother, tighter, and more youthful skin.

items.title: Faster Recovery
items.desc: Minimal downtime with targeted treatment zones

items.title: Customizable
items.desc: Tailored intensity for your unique skin needs

concerns.title: Skin Concerns We Treat
concerns.subtitle: Our fractional CO2 laser effectively addresses multiple skin concerns with precision and care.

items.title: Consultation
items.desc: Thorough skin assessment to customize your treatment plan

items.title: Treatment
items.desc: Numbing cream applied, then precise laser delivery to target areas

items.title: Recovery
items.desc: Follow aftercare guidelines for optimal healing and results

items.name: Kumar Raj
items.text: CO2 laser resurfacing for acne scars was effective, and the cost was very affordable.

items.name: Mai Lin
items.text: This was my second session and I already loved my skin. Can't recommend enough!

items.name: Linh Nguyen
items.text: Significantly reduced my acne scars. My skin felt rejuvenated and fresh.

faq.a: Typically 2-4 sessions, spaced 4-6 weeks apart, depending on severity.
A numbing cream is applied beforehand. You may feel mild warmth but discomfort is minimal.
Expect 3-7 days of peeling and redness. Sun protection is essential during healing.

faq.q: Is it safe for all skin tones?
faq.a: Yes, with proper consultation to customize settings and prevent pigmentation risks.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Skin?
cta.description: Schedule your consultation today and discover how fractional CO2 laser can help you achieve radiant, youthful skin.
